Registry / Terms / maximum permissible error (mpe)

maximum permissible error (mpe)

VIMOutdated — VIM 1993 G 18 #00826 · 17 instances

Authoritative definition

VIM 1993 · concept #5.21view ↗

extreme values of an error permitted by specifications, regulations, etc. for a given measuring instrument

Outdated: Cites VIM 1993. Latest: VIM 2012.
  • VIM 1993 · #5.21
    extreme values of an error permitted by specifications, regulations, etc. for a given measuring instrument

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH ✗ This term is NOT in VIM 2012. It may have been removed, renamed, or superseded by a different concept.
  2. MEDIUM 16 distinct definitions — harmonise.
  3. LOW 15 partially diverge.

#02119

extreme value of the measurement error, with respect to a known reference quantity value, permitted by specifications or regulations for a given measurement, measuring instrument, or measuring system

extreme values permitted by this Recommendation for an error
